content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against e622cfc72021b00f85d302f25318d0b1faf7dcd4 and ignored live `.ralph-burning/projects/niftx-2` state. Targeted affected tests run via `nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub --locked ...` passed, but one remaining pid-file race needs amendment.

## Amendments

1. src/cli/run.rs:11416 and src/cli/run.rs:11424 still leave `kill_tracked_descendant_processes_survives_parent_exit` racing the pid-file writer. The loop exits as soon as the file exists/readable, then parses once; shell redirection can briefly create an empty file before `echo $$` writes the PID, so the unignored test can still panic before writing `release-parent` and leave helper processes behind. Keep polling until the file contents parse as a valid PID before continuing.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This bead is specifically about stabilizing formerly ignored flaky tests; this keeps one of the target tests vulnerable to the same class of pid-file timing race.
